nodes.title: CURRENT LOOP PROMPT
widgets_values: A gorgeous woman is sitting outside at a pizza restaurant. She drinks from the wine glass.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: The woman lift up the wine glass and takes a sip. She then puts down the glass again on the table.
